test.note: Requires TURSO_DATABASE_URL env var set explicitly due to relative path in .env

blockingIssues.description: Series move operation does not recalculate capacity for origin/destination slots. Comments reference VAL-ADM-005 but implementation only updates slotId/staffUserId without calling releaseCapacity on origin or consumeCapacity on destination. Capacity remains consumed from original slots.
Single instance move operation does not recalculate capacity. Same issue as series move - only slotId/staffUserId updated without capacity recalculation. VAL-ADM-005 expectation not met.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that tests which require real database (TURSO_DATABASE_URL) need explicit env setup in the test command, since .env has relative path from server/ directory but tests run from root.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: bookings-capacity.test.ts and reservation-idempotency.test.ts import from capacity.ts which imports db, requiring TURSO_DATABASE_URL. Running 'bun run test' from root doesn't load the .env properly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the idempotency-key infrastructure pattern (schema idempotencyKey, hashPayload, checkIdempotencyKey, storeIdempotencyKey) implemented in reservation-series.ts as a reference for future workers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature admin-reservations-idempotency-conflicts-integrity introduced this pattern which is new to the codebase.

issues.description: Series creation not wrapped in database transaction - potential orphaned series if crash occurs mid-creation
Rollback in series create doesn't clean up individual bookings already created
